name: Creme Semisweet Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and butter over a double boiler using boiling water.
2. Gradually add the evaporated milk while stirring until smooth.
3. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Add the marshmallow cream and beat until smooth.
Yield: Frosts sides and tops of 8 or 9 inch layer cake.
Food Exchange per serving:
- 1/20 of CAKE
- 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
